summary: Complete testing of Golf Trip Planner 'Your Schedule' feature. All features verified working correctly. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All schedule-related flows working including per-service scheduling, date constraints, time range (06:00-22:00), and optional schedule entries.

schedule_feature_verification.transfer_only_2_rows: PASS - Transfer-only selection shows 2 schedule rows: 'Arrival Pickup' and 'Departure Pickup'
schedule_feature_verification.beach_club_only_1_row: PASS - Beach Club-only shows 1 row: 'Beach Club'
schedule_feature_verification.all_4_services_4_rows: PASS - All 4 services shows 4 rows: Arrival Pickup, Dinner Reservation, Beach Club, Departure Pickup
schedule_feature_verification.date_dropdown_constrained: PASS - Date dropdowns only show dates within selected arrival-departure range
schedule_feature_verification.time_dropdown_full_range: PASS - Time dropdowns include all times from 06:00 to 22:00 (17 options)
schedule_feature_verification.early_times_available: PASS - Early times (06:00, 07:00, 08:00) available for transfer pickups
schedule_feature_verification.schedule_appears_after_date: PASS - Schedule section only appears after arrival date is picked
schedule_feature_verification.schedule_optional: PASS - Wizard proceeds even if schedule is empty
schedule_feature_verification.contact_summary_shows_schedule: PASS - Step 4 Contact Summary shows individual schedule entries
schedule_feature_verification.group_size_controls: PASS - Group size +/- buttons work correctly (min 1, max 20)

backend_api_tests.schedule_with_transfer_only: PASS - POST /api/trip-planner accepts schedule dict for transfer-only
backend_api_tests.schedule_with_restaurant_only: PASS - POST /api/trip-planner accepts schedule dict for restaurant-only
backend_api_tests.schedule_with_beach_club_only: PASS - POST /api/trip-planner accepts schedule dict for beach_club-only
backend_api_tests.schedule_with_all_services: PASS - POST /api/trip-planner accepts schedule dict with all 4 services
backend_api_tests.schedule_optional_null: PASS - schedule field is optional (null accepted)
backend_api_tests.early_morning_times: PASS - Early times (06:00, 07:00) accepted in schedule
backend_api_tests.late_evening_times: PASS - Late times (21:00, 22:00) accepted in schedule
backend_api_tests.partial_schedule_entries: PASS - Partial entries (only date or only time) accepted
backend_api_tests.legacy_time_field: PASS - Legacy 'time' field still works for backward compatibility

full_wizard_flow.step1_services_budget: PASS - Services and budget selection works
full_wizard_flow.step2_dates_schedule: PASS - Date range and schedule entry works
full_wizard_flow.step4_contact_submit: PASS - Contact form and submission works
full_wizard_flow.success_view: PASS - Success view shown after submission

passed_tests: Transfer-only shows 2 schedule rows (Arrival Pickup, Departure Pickup)
Date dropdowns constrained to arrival-departure range
Schedule section appears only after arrival date selected
seed_data_creation: Created test trip requests via API with TEST_ prefix for identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: The 'Your Schedule' feature is fully implemented and working. Key data-testids for schedule: schedule-transfer_arrival, schedule-transfer_departure, schedule-restaurant, schedule-beach_club, schedule-{key}-date, schedule-{key}-time. TIMES array now includes 06:00-22:00. Schedule is stored as dict like {transfer_arrival: {date: '2026-03-25', time: '10:00'}}. Backend accepts 'schedule' field (Optional[dict]). Legacy 'time' field still works. Hotel service doesn't need a schedule row.
